title: Cobblemon Interface: Recolored
description: Changes the colors of the Cobblemon Interface resoucepack to match the Pokémon health and exp bar colors from Cobblemon.
body:
# ‼️ Archived ‼️

The textures have been added to the [base Cobblemon Interface](https://modrinth.com/project/cobblemon-interface) resourcepack and can be accessed by using [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) mod to change the resourcepack config.

# Cobblemon Interface: Recolored

An optional addon to [Cobblemon Interface](https://modrinth.com/project/cobblemon-interface) resourcepack that changes the health and experience bars to pair with the colors used in Pokémon's HP and EXP in [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon).

## Comparison

Before -> After

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/R6DWLPUQ/images/13d519c1800e148aba30884cca336a74b13fb705.png)

## Matching Colors

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/R6DWLPUQ/images/fadbc54d84c027b8b2126191ec9b894bae1793f0.png)
